name: dvala-monorepo
description: Monorepo root for Dvala — a suspendable, time-traveling functional language for JavaScript with algebraic effects. Sub-packages live under packages/* and apps/*; this root no longer ships an importable package.
author: Albert Mojir

scripts.typecheck: turbo run build && tsgo -p ./tsconfig.compile.json --noEmit && tsgo -p vscode-dvala/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.check: pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run knip && pnpm run build && pnpm run test
scripts.check:no-fix: pnpm run lint:no-fix && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run knip && pnpm run test
scripts.clean: pnpm run clean-dvala && pnpm run clean-playground && rm -rf .turbo coverage test-results vscode-dvala/out .cache
scripts.clean-dvala: rm -rf dist build packages/dvala-runtime/dist packages/dvala-workspace-backend/dist packages/dvala-mcp-server/dist packages/dvala-core-tooling/dist packages/dvala-cli/dist packages/dvala-test-framework/dist packages/dvala-types/dist packages/dvala-engine/dist apps/playground-www/dist
scripts.build: pnpm run build-cli && pnpm run build-mcp && pnpm run build-playground-www && pnpm run build-playground && pnpm run build-vscode-ext
scripts.build-cli: turbo run build --filter=@mojir/dvala-cli && rolldown -c rolldown.config.cli.mjs && chmod +x dist/cli/cli.js
scripts.build-mcp: turbo run build --filter=@mojir/dvala-mcp-server && rolldown -c rolldown.config.mcp-server.mjs && chmod +x dist/mcp-server/server.js
scripts.build-playground: turbo run build --filter=@mojir/dvala-workspace-backend --filter=@mojir/dvala-core-tooling --filter=@mojir/dvala-engine && rolldown -c rolldown.config.playground-builder.mjs && rolldown -c rolldown.config.playground-www.mjs && node ./playground-builder/build/buildPlaygroundSite.js
scripts.install-hooks: git config core.hooksPath .githooks && echo 'git hooks installed: core.hooksPath=.githooks'
scripts.uninstall-hooks: git config --unset core.hooksPath && echo 'git hooks uninstalled: core.hooksPath unset'
